dimensions.boundary: release-mode integration-test process, not an operation latency

network.claim: not LAN, Wi-Fi, mobile, or production latency

measurement_boundary: single-machine local IPC/TCP/QUIC loopback plus in-memory Link state machines; not a real network claim

metadata.claim_boundary: loopback results must not be described as LAN, Wi-Fi, mobile, or production latency
